{"parentUuid":"e955a848-479f-42dd-9e92-7f7629e53263","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_013sJXAheKveipRcb1tzC2hb","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"---\n\n## סיכום — מה היה שבור ומה תוקן\n\n### שתי בעיות מרכזיות תוקנו:\n\n**1. PostToolUse hook נכשל על כל Edit/Write** ← תוקן\n- הסרתי את `npm run typecheck` מ-project `settings.json`\n- אין `package.json` בפרויקט — הפקודה נכשלה בשקט בכל עריכה וזרקה שגיאות לתוך tool results\n\n**2. מפתחות כפולים ב-`.claude.json`** ← תוקן\n- הרשומות הישנות של `עיצוב חזית הדבקה על זכוכיות גוניור` (עם uppercase ו-lowercase C) נמחקו\n- PowerShell לא יכול היה לפרסר את הקובץ בגלל duplicate keys\n- גם REPLICATE API key שהיה חשוף ברשומה הישנה הוסר\n\n### מה שנשאר תקין:\n- MCPs: playwright ו-context7 גלובליים ב-`.claude.json`, GitHub בלבד בפרויקט `.mcp.json` — נכון\n- Hooks: SessionStart (כללים), Stop (session recorder + ריוי), PreCompact — כולם תקינים\n- הגדרות אבטחה: destructive command blocker בגלובל — תקין\n\nכעת אתה יכול לתקשר בצורה תקינה."}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":447,"cache_read_input_tokens":78107,"output_tokens":431,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":447,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":431,"cache_read_input_tokens":78107,"cache_creation_input_tokens":447,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":447},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbqJb9PNjCEZ98w1MXoAn","type":"assistant","uuid":"e5fcf246-fbb5-4b27-be03-611a8e02d8c2","timestamp":"2026-06-08T06:16:54.847Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"C:\\Users\\yaniv\\ליו","sessionId":"4a9ac51f-f115-4c58-b2ee-eb5f4e4e2ee1","version":"2.1.168","gitBranch":"master"}

{"parentUuid":"3f470d4f-43ea-421c-b7dc-b9eed1f00163","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01L9poxA2Weyd3hwEEzY4WtX","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"The user is asking: \"If I open Claude Code next time with a new agent, will it still be under the global [settings]?\"\n\nThey want to understand whether the global settings (`~/.claude/settings.json`) apply to new sessions/agents automatically.\n\nLet me explain the Claude Code settings hierarchy:\n1. `~/.claude.json` — global user state (MCP servers, project data)\n2. `~/.claude/settings.json` — global user settings (hooks, permissions) — applies to ALL projects/sessions\n3. `.claude/settings.json` (project-level) — applies only to that project\n\nSo yes, when a new session starts in any project, the global `~/.claude/settings.json` applies automatically. The project-level `.claude/settings.json` also applies when you're in that project directory.\nThe changes I made to the global settings will persist across all future sessions, so any new agent you start will automatically inherit those configurations.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":547,"cache_read_input_tokens":78554,"output_tokens":580,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":547,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":3,"output_tokens":580,"cache_read_input_tokens":78554,"cache_creation_input_tokens":547,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":547},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbqJm7fidNHi9uGcn8R4F","type":"assistant","uuid":"6db82ad2-7a84-419c-88e4-3a1f13bf8c39","timestamp":"2026-06-08T06:19:05.972Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Users\\yaniv\\ליו","sessionId":"4a9ac51f-f115-4c58-b2ee-eb5f4e4e2ee1","version":"2.1.168","gitBranch":"master"}
{"parentUuid":"6db82ad2-7a84-419c-88e4-3a1f13bf8c39","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01L9poxA2Weyd3hwEEzY4WtX","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"כן. כך עובד hierarchy ההגדרות ב-Claude Code:\n\n```\n~/.claude/settings.json          ← גלובלי — חל על כל סשן, כל פרויקט\nC:\\Users\\yaniv\\ליו\\.claude\\settings.json  ← פרויקטי — חל רק כשנמצאים בתיקייה הזו\n```\n\nכשתפתח Claude Code בפעם הבאה — בכל פרויקט — הגלובלי נטען אוטומטית. זה אומר:\n- ה-Stop hooks (sound + ריוי) יפעלו תמיד\n- ה-PreToolUse destructive command blocker יפעל תמיד  \n- SessionStart template copy יפעל תמיד בפרויקט חדש\n\nה-project settings מתווסף **מעל** הגלובלי בפרויקט ליו — לא מחליף אותו.\n\n`.claude.json` (הקובץ שתיקנתי) הוא קצת שונה — הוא state שניהול Claude Code בעצמו (אלו projects אושרו, אלו MCP servers הוגדרו per-project). הוא נטען אוטומטית כל פעם."}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":547,"cache_read_input_tokens":78554,"output_tokens":580,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":547,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":3,"output_tokens":580,"cache_read_input_tokens":78554,"cache_creation_input_tokens":547,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":547},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbqJm7fidNHi9uGcn8R4F","type":"assistant","uuid":"e2ad336c-d45a-426a-af64-e4ae928fafe3","timestamp":"2026-06-08T06:19:12.766Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Users\\yaniv\\ליו","sessionId":"4a9ac51f-f115-4c58-b2ee-eb5f4e4e2ee1","version":"2.1.168","gitBranch":"master"}

{"parentUuid":"6b5297f9-6413-4b00-8ed5-9f893584d6e6","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01D4aVPGrdh3JT8PH4pRifY9","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"The user is asking: \"If I open a new folder, does that remove you?\" - meaning, if they open a different project directory in Claude Code, does that disconnect them from the current Claude instance or remove Claude Code?\n\nI think they might be asking about whether opening a new folder would lose the current context/session, or whether the global settings would still apply, or maybe they're asking something about the VS Code extension behavior.\n\nLet me think about what they mean. In Claude Code (VS Code extension), when you open a new folder/workspace, Claude Code starts a new session with that directory as the working directory. The global settings still apply.
